title: UltimaCraft Modded
description: Seamlessly blending mod textures for a more cohesive experience. Also introduces connected textures for modded blocks
body:
![](https://i.ibb.co/Gc0n9fR/pbr-modded-poster.jpg)

# UltimaCraft Modded

**UltimaCraft Modded** is an expanded version of the regular [UltimaCraft resource pack](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ultimacraft) (which included) offering a comprehensive enhancement for modded gameplay.

## Features

Vanilla:
- custom block models (doors, trapdoors etc.)
- random block variations
- texture fixes and tweaks
- item animations

[Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) (or [alternative](https://github.com/LambdAurora/optifine_alternatives)):
- connected textures
- biome depended textures
- environment improvements

## Mod support

Supported mods:
- Biomes'O Plenty (partial)
- Create (partial)
- Create Deco (partial)

---

_© You can use UltimaCraft PBR publicly, but you can not claim it as your property._
